name: Seismic Shockwave
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>震</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Destroy this card during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation. Activate this card when a face-up Dinosaur-Type monster you control is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard (except during the Damage Step): Choose 3 of your opponent's unused Spell & Trap Zones. Those Zones cannot be used. If this card destroys itself: You can target 1 Dinosaur-Type monster in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
eff: Destroy this card during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation. Activate this card when a face-up Dinosaur-Type monster you control is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard (except during the Damage Step): Choose 3 of your opponent's unused Spell & Trap Zones. Those Zones cannot be used. If this card destroys itself: You can target 1 Dinosaur-Type monster in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

eff_types: Continuous-like, Activation requirement, Effect, Continuous-like, Trigger-like
action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
